task_title: Investigative report: are we losing money to dup submits

scores.justification: Agent successfully identified and retrieved the triple-submit cluster o067/o068/o069 with matching user_id (u008), total_cents (4999), and timestamps 1 second apart (2026-04-10T08:12:15/16/17Z).

Agent retrieved all three orders showing o068 and o069 are refunded duplicates of o067, quantifying the exposure as 2 duplicate orders at $49.99 each (4999 cents), totaling $99.98 in duplicate submissions.

Agent did not produce a final report with a specific policy recommendation; the transcript ends mid-investigation with tool failures and no written report containing recommended next actions like idempotency keys, rate-limiting, or dedup jobs.

Agent did not produce a final written report with a clear yes/no/partial verdict on whether the company is losing money to duplicate submissions; investigation was incomplete due to tool execution failures.
